series.curator_notes: This is not a traditional episodic Hörspiel series. The artist 'Alles steht Kopf' only contains audiobook adaptations of the two Disney/Pixar 'Inside Out' films, split into chapters. No standalone Hörspiel episodes (Folge 1, 2, etc.) exist for this series on Spotify.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.

verification.concerns: The first AI (kimi-k2.5) incorrectly proposed to INCLUDE two movie audiobook adaptations (Alles steht Kopf and Alles steht Kopf 2 - the German titles for Inside Out and Inside Out 2). These are audiobook adaptations of Disney/Pixar films, NOT episodic Hörspiel series entries. The first AI originally correctly excluded these but then proposed overrides to include them, which is wrong. The original exclusion decision was correct - these are movie soundtracks/audiobooks, not children's audio series episodes. This series has 0 included albums which appears correct - there doesn't seem to be an episodic 'Alles steht Kopf' Hörspiel series in the catalog.
